title: Mite In Na Sungah Jesuh A Mu Diam?

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa deihna bangin i gamta hiam,
Pai kawikawi a na i sepna peuhah;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nang sung Jesuh a kimu diam?
Na heina teng khempeuh ah na itna kilang hiam?

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ki-itna takpi eite’n i nei hiam,
Bangbang i tuak zong eite’n i sem diam?

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong kisim thei dingin laimal bangin,
Jesuh kiang mite’n a zuat theih na’ngin,
